title: Fix generate ifs to allow sharing same dotted name

features.name: generate if/else with shared scope name and different module instantiations
features.description: Code should include generate if/else blocks where different branches use the same scope name to instantiate different modules based on parameters

features.name: dotted access to instance inside generate scope
features.description: Code should include dotted path access to module instances that are inside generate scopes with shared names across branches

features.name: generate block without generate keyword
features.description: Code should include if/else blocks inside a module that behave like generate blocks (with begin:end labels) but without the explicit generate/endgenerate keywords
